ai_summary: CLI tool that turns meaningful project activity into AI-readable context and enables public AI collaboration through GitHub-synced context endpoints.

recent_updates.title: Improved AI context delivery service
recent_updates.impact: Improves how AI tools consume project context through local endpoints.

key_features: Project intelligence engine that turns development activity into AI-readable state
Public GitHub sync for AI-readable project context
Local server for AI-readable project context endpoints
Meaningful change tracking that filters noise from project activity
CLI workflow for initializing, updating, and linking AI context
Guided setup flow for safe AI context initialization
known_issues: No automated test suite is detected yet.
next_steps: Add automated tests for the intelligence engine, watcher, and GitHub sync workflow.
